sources.page_title: Discover Gyeon Ironwheel Cleaner for shining wheels - Car Care Shop
sources.cleaned_content:
GYEON Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED

SKU: VQ2MIWC

- Highly effective wheel cleaner based on Q²M Iron Fallout Remover
- Gel-like consistency for extended dwell time
- Improved cleaning performance and reduced odor of the REDEFINED version
- Ideal as preparation for wheel coating like Q² Rim
- Safe for coated and uncoated wheels
- No damage to wheel or ceramic coatings

Category: Rim care

Hazard Information:
WARNING!
H315: Causes skin irritation.
H317: May cause an allergic skin reaction.
H319: Causes serious eye irritation.

Volumes available: 500 ml, 1.0 Liter, 4.0 Liter

Price: from 14.00 € (28.00 € per 1 l)
incl. 19% VAT

Description

Gyeon Ironwheel Cleaner - Effective Cleaning for Your Wheels

Q²M Iron WheelCleaner Redefined is a special and highly effective cleaner for all types of wheels and rims. Its powerful gel formula adheres exceptionally well to surfaces, loosening and efficiently dissolving rust, dirt, and brake dust while removing iron deposits.

The Advanced Gel Formula for Brilliant Results

Gyeon Ironwheel Cleaner is the optimal solution for car enthusiasts looking to clean their wheels thoroughly without compromising the surface. This special formula adheres perfectly to the wheels, effortlessly loosening tough contaminants like brake dust, rust, and organic residues. With a subtle, pleasant banana scent, it offers a top-tier cleaning experience without the unpleasant odor of traditional cleaners. In contrast to the strong, rather unpleasant odors of previous versions and most wheel cleaners on the market, the new REDEFINED formula has a much subtler scent reminiscent of banana. Enjoy a more pleasant cleaning experience without the overwhelming smell of rotten eggs.

Efficiently Removes Iron Deposits and Dirt

The powerful formula of Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED has been enhanced to efficiently remove dirt, grime, and brake dust. The "Iron" in its name signifies its remarkably strong ability to remove iron deposits without neglecting the typical wheel cleaner characteristics of the product. Organic residues like tar, which also accumulate on wheels, are also removed without leaving any residue.

Summary of Product Description:

Discover the Gyeon Ironwheel Cleaner, specially developed for all types of wheels. The gel formula of the REDEFINED cleaner allows outstanding adhesion to the surface and efficiently dissolves iron deposits, tough dirt, and brake dust. Its gentle banana scent ensures a pleasant cleaning experience that leaves behind the typical odor of conventional products.

Application Instructions

- Spray onto dry vehicle
- Once the cleaner reacts, dirt will turn purple
- Allow to dwell for maximum 2-3 minutes
- Rinse off with plenty of water
- Repeat process if needed until discoloration stops

Additional Notes and Tips:
- Suitable for all types of wheels
- Wear gloves during application
- Do not apply on hot surfaces
- Maximum dwell time is 2-3 minutes

FAQ

Question: Is the cleaner suitable for all types of wheels?
Answer: Yes, it is safe for all types of wheels and surfaces, including coated ones.

Question: How long should the cleaner remain on the wheels?
Answer: Depending on the level of dirt, leave it on for about 3-5 minutes until it effectively loosens the contaminants.

Question: Does the cleaner remove stubborn iron deposits?
Answer: Absolutely, the special formula efficiently removes iron deposits, leaving your wheels clean and shiny.

Gyeon Iron - 500 ml

Price: $19.99

Product Images:
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Iron-500-ml_1419_1_lw_2322.jpg
- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Iron-500-ml_1419_1_lw_2797.jpg

- https://www.detailedimage.com/products/auto/Gyeon-Iron-500-ml_1419_1_lw_4635.jpg

Available Sizes:
- 500 ml - $19.99 ($0.04/ml)
- 1000 ml - $33.99 ($0.03/ml)
- 4 L - $109.99 ($0.03/ml)

Quantity Discounts:
- 2+ units: $18.99 (5% savings)

Product Information

- Remove brake and rail dust from your paint and rims!
- Color changing formula illustrates when iron deposits can be rinsed away
- Mist, let dwell, rinse away, it is that easy!
- Safely removes stubborn iron deposits
- Product Codes: GY-0902, GY-0919, GY-0926

Customer Reviews: 86% of customers said that they would buy this item again. Based upon 14 ratings.

Product Description

Gyeon Iron will help you remove ferrous deposits such as brake dust and rail dust safe and easy! This unique formula is strong enough to remove this tough contamination, yet gentle and pH neutral. This means Gyeon Iron will make quick work of caked-on brake and rail dust, while being safe to apply on your paint, wheels, trim, glass, etc. To apply, start with a cool wet surface and simply spray this product onto the desired area, letting it dwell. After about 60 seconds you will see the formula change to a deep purple. This illustrates that the formula is reacting and removing the deposits that are on the surface or embedded in the finish! Follow up with a rinse and you are all set. What you will be left with is a clean surface, free of iron and brake dust! Remember to never let the product dry on the surface and to thoroughly rinse or wash off once finished. For any heavily soiled areas, we recommend multiple applications and/or agitating with your favorite detailing brush. Grab yourself a bottle of the Gyeon Iron, brake dust won't thank you, but your car certainly will!

Professional Detailer Reviews

I tested the Gyeon Iron product on a few different wheels as well as paint and it performed really well. It was definitely a product that impressed right away and worked really well. The wheels below of which I took pictures don't look too dirty but they had a lot of small tar and iron contamination, as expected on an Audi. For these photos I decided to show how Gyeon Iron works without any brushes and mitts, simply spraying it on the wheel, allowing it to break down the deposits, then rinsing off.
- Product Review: Gyeon Iron by Ivan Rajic

From The Label

Product Description: Efficient & powerful all surface iron contamination remover. Safe to use on paint, wheels, glass, and trim. Removes bonded iron particles easily. More power, less smell.
- No odour
- Instant action
- Safe on all surfaces

Directions: Shake well before use. Apply on a pre-washed surface. Let it work for 2-4 minutes until the product changes its colour. Rinse well. Avoid direct sunlight. Do not let it dry. May cause skin irritation. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.

Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Douglas B. on 9/24/2025 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Works great and has a pleasant smell (unless you ask my wife, but she has not smelled the Carpro Iron X). Makes decon quick and easy.

Reviewed by Jon G. on 5/9/2024 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
I used this with a DIY Detail Clay Towel and it was awesome. I didn't have to use a lot of product with that method.

Reviewed by James I. B. on 5/3/2021 (DI Verified Purchase)
Would they buy this item again? Yes
Works as advertised....used it for several years. No reason to try another product.

GYEON Q2M Iron Remover

Brand: GYEON Quartz

Price: $19.99
Availability: In stock
Usually ships within 1-2 business days
SKU: GY-IRON-MAIN

Sizes: 500 mL, 1 Liter

Product Images:
- https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-ndtdat03b2/images/stencil/1200x1200/products/9126/25942/iron__84774.1767633016.png
- https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-ndtdat03b2/images/stencil/1200x1200/products/9126/25931/Benefits-iron_redefined_490x.progressive__62954.1767633016.jpg
- https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-ndtdat03b2/images/stencil/1200x1200/products/9126/25932/Application-iron_redefined_490x.progressive__36642.1767633016.jpg
- https://cdn11.bigcommerce.com/s-ndtdat03b2/images/stencil/1200x1200/products/9126/23114/913O4kAIknL._AC_SL1500___53606.1767632073.jpg

Key Features:
- Removes iron particles from brake dust and industrial fallout without damage.
- Protects surfaces from rust, pitting, and damage caused by ferrous particles.
- Color-changing formula shows where it's working.

Specifications

| SKU(s) | GY-IRON-MAIN, GY-0902, GY-0919 |
| Product Form | Liquid |
| Applicable Finishes | Paintwork, Wheels, Glass, Chrome, Plastic Trims |

Why Buy?

GYEON Q2M Iron Remover makes fast work of iron removal during the decontamination process. This easy to use and safe formula works hard to remove nasty ferrous particles from brake dust, rail dust, and other industrial fallout without damaging delicate automotive surfaces. GYEON Q2M Iron Remover chemically removes iron particles so they are no longer a threat to your vehicle's finish.

How to Use

Always work out of direct sunlight, on a surface that is cool to the touch.
- Thoroughly wash the surfaces being treated.
- Spray a liberal amount of GYEON Q2M Iron onto the surface and allow to dwell for several minutes. DO NOT ALLOW IT TO DRY ON THE SURFACE.
- For heavily soiled areas agitate with a damp sponge, microfiber towel, or appropriate brush.
- Rinse well.
- Follow with detailing clay to ensure that any non-ferrous contaminants have also been removed from the surface.

Product Description

Remove ferrous particles from wheels and paint with less effort!

GYEON Q2M Iron Remover makes fast work of iron removal during the decontamination process. This easy to use and safe formula works hard to remove nasty ferrous particles from brake dust, rail dust, and other industrial fallout without damaging delicate automotive surfaces. GYEON Q2M Iron Remover chemically removes iron particles so they are no longer a threat to your vehicle's finish.

Iron. It's everywhere, even inside your body, but when it flakes off of brake components and embeds itself in wheels, or worse, in paint, it can cause rust, pitting, and other irreversible damage. GYEON Q2M Iron Remover helps eliminate the risk that ferrous particles cause to the finishes of our vehicle by actively dissolving away the threat.

GYEON Q2M Iron Remover has a neutral pH, making it safe for use on all types of rims, glass, and even clear coat. The color-changing formula reacts with iron particles on contact so you can actually see it working. GYEON Q2M Iron Remover makes the decontamination process faster and easier, so you can move on to polishing, and then coating your vehicle!

Directions:
Always work out of direct sunlight, on a surface that is cool to the touch.
- Thoroughly wash the surfaces being treated.
- Spray a liberal amount of GYEON Q2M Iron onto the surface and allow to dwell for several minutes. DO NOT ALLOW IT TO DRY ON THE SURFACE.
- For heavily soiled areas agitate with a damp sponge, microfiber towel, or appropriate brush.
- Rinse well.
- Follow with detailing clay to ensure that any non-ferrous contaminants have also been removed from the surface.

Proposition 65 Warning for California Consumers

Video: Q²M Iron #GYEONArchive (YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-9AoPyL9bLc)

Gyeon Q2M Iron - 500mL/4L

Rating: 4.8 out of 5 stars (53 Reviews)

Price (AUD):
- 500ml - $27.99
- 4L - $159.99

Product Images:
- https://www.detailstore.com.au/cdn/shop/files/500-iron-1500.jpg?v=1712199297
- https://www.detailstore.com.au/cdn/shop/files/Gyeon_Q2M_Iron_-_4L.jpg?v=1724132383

Description

Gyeon continues with their innovative product designs for the needs of amateur and professional detailers with this fast acting brake dust / iron fallout cleaner creating Gyeon Q2M Iron – making which has become one of the quickest acting iron fallout removers out on the market to date!

The main key ingredient in Gyeon Q2M Iron is a strong neutralised acid-salt. This reduces ferrous composites into a soluble form that can be easily rinsed away with water or high pressure system. This results in a safer way to remove these iron fallouts / brake dust from your wheels and other surfaces with little or no agitation required.

Q2M Iron (Deironizer) has been formulated to be safe on all exterior surfaces, including plastics, trims, polished surfaces, wheels and paintwork to effectively remove and dissolve brake dust, rail dust and other iron particles upon contact. This cleaner also contains strong wheel cleaning detergents that will also remove general dirt, debris and other road contaminants from the surface or your wheels.

This product is particularly useful for those who own European cars and other cars fitted with larger brake kits that product excessive brake dust.

96% would recommend this product

Value Rating: 4.5 out of 5

Reviews Summary (AI-generated from 52 most recent reviews):
Customers say this iron remover effectively cleans wheels and surfaces, with a distinctive purple color reaction showing where it works. Many reviews mention its strong performance on brake dust and stubborn contaminants. The product's notable odor is frequently discussed, with users recommending outdoor use. Common feedback includes its effectiveness on wheels, though some note multiple applications may be needed. Reviews highlight its quick-acting formula and ease of rinsing. The spray bottle functionality receives mixed comments, with some mentioning durability concerns.
